steps.title: Use the middle table row
steps.content: Write the quadratic as $f(x)=ax^2+bx+c$. Since $f(0)=16$, the constant term is $c=16$.

steps.title: Use the other two rows
steps.content:
Substitute the rows for $x=1$ and $x=-1$.
$$a+b+16=24$$
$$a-b+16=10$$
So
$$a+b=8$$
$$a-b=-6$$
Solving gives $a=1$ and $b=7$.
